title: Create: Oreos
description: This mod adds... Oreos for the create mod (who would've guessed that). It also adds 2 new plants and 2 new fluids!
body:
# Create: Oreo's

Create: Oreo's is a Create addon that adds Oreo-style cookies made using Create machines.

## Features:

- Multiple cookie bases
- Flavored fillings as fluids
- Create mixing, filling, and deploying recipes
- Fully survival-friendly

Requires Create 6.
